searchParam.name: _id

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Goal resources for a patient (Required)

searchParam.documentation: Search by lifecycleStatus

searchParam.name: target-date
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Goals for by target-date

searchParam.name: type
searchParam.documentation: Search by type. Currently supports: "person"

searchParam.name: _summary
searchParam.documentation: Requests the server to return a subset of the resource

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single Group by logical id

searchParam.name: _outputFormat
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $export only. The format for the requested bulk data files to be generated. Defaults to application/fhir+ndjson.

searchParam.name: _since
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $export only. Resources will be included in the response if their state has changed after the supplied time.

searchParam.name: _type
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $export only. A string of comma-delimited FHIR resource types. Only resources of the specified resource types(s) SHALL be included in the response. If this parameter is omitted, the server SHALL return all supported resources within the scope of the client authorization.

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single Immunization by logical id

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Immunization resources for a patient

searchParam.name: status
searchParam.documentation: Search by Immunization.status. (completed or entered-in-error or not-done)

searchParam.name: date
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Immunization for a specified date/range

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single Location by logical id

searchParam.name: _count
searchParam.documentation: The maximum number of search results on a page

searchParam.name: continue
searchParam.documentation: ID to allow continuation of the search

searchParam.name: name
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Location resources that match the name

searchParam.name: address
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Location resources that match the address string

searchParam.name: address-city
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Location resources that match the address city string

searchParam.name: address-state
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Location resources that match the address state string

searchParam.name: address-postalcode
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Location resources that match the address postal code string

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single MedicationRequest by logical id

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search for all MedicationRequest resources for a patient

searchParam.name: intent
searchParam.documentation: Search for all MedicationRequest for a specified intent [proposal, plan, order, original-order, reflex-order, filer-order, instance-order, option]

searchParam.name: status
searchParam.documentation: Search for all MedicationRequest for a specified status [active, cancelled, completed]

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single Observation by logical id

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Observation resources for a patient

searchParam.name: category
searchParam.documentation: Search by Observation.category

searchParam.name: code
searchParam.documentation: Search by Observation.code

searchParam.name: date
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Observation for a specified date of visit

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single Organization by logical id

searchParam.name: name
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Organization resources that match the name

searchParam.name: address
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all Organization resources that match the address string

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single patient by logical id

searchParam.name: identifier
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single patient by identifier

searchParam.name: name
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single patient by "Last,First" name

searchParam.name: birthdate
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single patient by birthDate

searchParam.name: gender
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single patient by gender

searchParam.name: family
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single patient by Last name

searchParam.name: _outputFormat
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $export only. The format for the requested bulk data files to be generated. Defaults to application/fhir+ndjson.

searchParam.name: _since
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $export only. Resources will be included in the response if their state has changed after the supplied time.

searchParam.name: _type
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $export and $everything only. A string of comma-delimited FHIR resource types. Only resources of the specified resource types(s) SHALL be included in the response. If this parameter is omitted, the server SHALL return all supported resources within the scope of the client authorization.

searchParam.name: start
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $everything only.

searchParam.name: end
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) For $everything only.

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) Retrieve single Practitioner by logical id. It is the resource ID being requested.

searchParam.name: _count
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) The max number of results to return in a single searchset.

searchParam.name: continue
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) String used to allow a search to continue where a previous search left off

searchParam.name: family
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) Retrieve Practitioner(s) by Last name. Do not use with 'given' parameter

searchParam.name: given
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) Retrieve Practitioner(s) by Given name. Do not use with 'identifier' or 'last' parameter.

searchParam.name: name
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) Retrieve Practitioner(s) by Last name OR First name.

searchParam.name: identifier
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) Retrieve single Practitioner by NPI, license number, or DEA number.

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single PractitionerRole by logical id

searchParam.name: _count
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) The max number of results to return in a single searchset.

searchParam.name: continue
searchParam.documentation: (Optional) String used to allow a search to continue where a previous search left off

searchParam.name: specialty
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all PractitionerRole resources that match the specialty

searchParam.name: practitioner
searchParam.documentation: Fetches a bundle of all PractitionerRole resources that correspond to practitioner(reference), practitioner.identifier(token) or practitioner.name(string)

searchParam.name: _id
searchParam.documentation: Retrieve single Procedures by logical id

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Procedure resources for a patient

searchParam.name: date
searchParam.documentation: Search for all Procedures for a specified date of visit

searchParam.name: context
searchParam.documentation: For use with $expand operation. DiagnosticReport.category for DiagnosticReport report category discovery, DiagnosticReport.code for DiagnosticReport report type discovery, DocumentReference.category for DocumentReference note category discovery, DocumentReference.type for DocumentReference note type discovery.

searchParam.name: contextDirection
searchParam.documentation: For use with $expand operation. "incoming" for write operations and "outgoing" for read operations.

name: uscore
description: This profile defines the capabilities expressed by the US Core FHIR R4 specification.
